mapper.select: SELECT u.*, d.dept_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT u.*, d.dept_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{user.username}, '%') AND u.status = #{user.status} ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
